name: Dogon leather clutch bag
description: Very Good Condition Authenticated Large Pink Leather Hermes Dogon Clutch Billfold Wallet. The closure strap and buckle are in good shape when some signs of use but functions perfectly as it should. The backside zipper functions perfectly as it should. The outside of the item is in really good shape with no major rips, tears, or any cracking of the leather to mention though there are some signs of use/wear. The inside of this item is in really good shape with no major rips, tears, or cracking of the leather lining to mention, there is some staining from use, scuff. Overall this is a very nice looking clutch wallet from the Hermes Fashion House. Please make sure to see all of the photos for the condition of this item! If you have any questions at all please feel free to ask! Will ship out by the next business day! *Please note this item will include a Hermes Dustbag and also a QR Coded Authentication Tag from the Vestiaire Collective Authentication Hub*
